name: Salmon Loaf Supreme with Cucumber Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup flake canned red salmon (15 oz.)
1/2 cup Cucumber, seeded and chopped (thoroughly drained)
Salt and freshly ground white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Blend all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Place the mixture in a buttered 1 1/2 quart loaf pan and sprinkle with additional cracker crumbs.
4. Bake for 50 minutes.
Cucumber Sauce
1. Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl.
2. Chill until ready to serve.
